hero.title: Explore plans around adaptation and resilience
hero.notFoundExplanation: We may not have that location in our database, or it may not yet be connected to our disclosure data.
hero.noDataBody: We don't yet have data to display for this location. We're continually expanding our coverage with historical disclosures and additional trusted data sources.

description.text: Browse local climate hazards, actions, and adaptation projects seeking funding from cities, states, and regions worldwide

maps.noHazardData: No map data available for this hazard

hazards.gdpLabel: Total GDP at Risk in USD

hazardDetail.title: Extreme Heat
hazardDetail.noActionsDisclosed: No adaptation actions disclosed for this hazard
hazardDetail.factorsLabel: Factors that affect ability to adapt
hazardDetail.crvaTitle: A Climate Risk and Vulnerability Assessment has been undertaken
hazardDetail.crvaVisitPortal: Visit the CDP Open Data Portal
hazardDetail.requestersTooltip: These are organizations that have requested disclosure from this jurisdiction. This list is not exhaustive and does not indicate government compliance or the specific purpose for which information was disclosed.
hazardDetail.noGeeData: External hazard data is not available for this hazard
hazardDetail.noGeeDataInfo: CDP and partners have not yet identified a reliable data source or methodology for displaying this information in a meaningful way.
hazardDetail.noMapData: No map data available for this hazard

hazardOverview.title: Hazard overview
hazardOverview.topHazardsTooltip: Hazards are ranked by how likely they are to occur and how severe their impact could be. This shows the top four — there may be other disclosed hazards not included in this list.
hazardOverview.mostExposedSectorsTooltip: Sectors are derived from disclosures and sorted by number of mentions or alphabetically. This reflects only what has been disclosed and does not indicate relative importance or completeness.

nonPublic.title: Report not available for public view
nonPublic.description: This jurisdiction's CDP report is not available to display. All hazard information displayed on this page is sourced from CDP analysis.
nonPublic.ctaDescription: To learn more about cities, states, and regions that report to CDP, visit our website.

nonDisclosing.title: No hazards disclosed
nonDisclosing.description: This jurisdiction did not report any hazards in its CDP questionnaire response. All hazard information displayed on this page is sourced from CDP analysis.
nonDisclosing.cta: Visit the CDP Open Data Portal
nonDisclosing.ctaDescription: To see more about what this jurisdiction reported, download the full questionnaire from the CDP Open Data Portal.

noReport.title: No report available
noReport.description: This jurisdiction does not currently report information through the CDP questionnaire. All hazard information displayed on this page is sourced from CDP analysis.
noReport.ctaDescription: To learn more about cities, states, and regions that report to CDP, visit our website.

detail.multipleTimeframesTooltip: This location disclosed multiple similar actions with multiple timeframes.

actionStatusesFull.FEASIBILITY_FINALIZED_NO_FINANCE: Feasibility finalized, but currently no finance secured
actionStatusesFull.FEASIBILITY_FINALIZED_PARTIAL_FINANCE: Feasibility finalized, and finance partially secured
actionStatusesFull.FEASIBILITY_FINALIZED_FULL_FINANCE: Feasibility finalized, and finance fully secured
actionStatusesFull.IMPLEMENTATION_COMPLETE_REPORTING_YEAR: Implementation complete in the reporting year
actionStatusesFull.IMPLEMENTATION_UNDERWAY_COMPLETION_LT_ON: Implementation underway with completion expected in less than one year
actionStatusesFull.IMPLEMENTATION_UNDERWAY_COMPLETION_GT_ON: Implementation underway with completion expected in more than one year
actionStatusesFull.ACTION_IN_OPERATION_MOST_OF_JURISDICTION: Action in operation (across most of jurisdiction)

solutions.alsoHasLocalAction: also has action(s) in this category
solutions.sourceDescription: Source: CDP aggregation and analysis of {{year}} disclosures from peer cities

emptyState.title: Ask a question about {{location}}.
emptyState.description: Use the input below to ask about risks, actions, or climate context for this location.

starterQuestions.primaryHazards: What are the primary climate hazards facing {{location}}?
starterQuestions.governmentActions: What actions is {{location}} taking to build climate resilience?
starterQuestions.solutions: Which climate solutions are most relevant for {{location}}?
starterQuestions.funding: What climate projects in {{location}} are seeking funding?
starterQuestions.primaryHazardDetails: What actions are being taken in {{location}} to address {{hazard}}?

notFound.title: We couldn't load this organization profile
notFound.descriptionPrefix: We couldn't find data for organization ID
notFound.descriptionSuffix: . The link may be outdated, or this organization may not have climate data available yet.
notFound.guidance: Check the organization ID in the URL, or return to search to open a different organization.
